concepts.name: Contact selectability partitioning (already_member precedence over blocked)
Invite modal picker/guidance-state DOM contract (invite-contact-select, disabled-option reasons, guidance empty state)
parseContactCard as the single npub/card decode seam app-wide (DD-1)
inviteByNpub(groupId, npub) MLS add-member contract, npub/pubkey-only (DD-8)
en/de key parity for all new user-facing copy
One shared contact-seeding-then-invite helper in group-setup.ts, no per-spec ad-hoc seeding

stories.name: contact-selectable-predicate
stories.notes: Pure predicate mirrors eligibleGroupsForContact/addableGroupsForContact/commonGroups in the same module: case-insensitive pubkey match via a lowercased Set, order-preserving .map, member-precedence-over-archived. No react/ndk/context imports added. Seam shape matches stories.json#seams exactly. Gate-remediation applied 2026-07-14: selectable branch omits disabledReason key; doc comment corrected; test assertions upgraded to toStrictEqual + explicit 'in' check. Re-review clean, unit suite green (3141 passed / 1 skipped).

stories.name: invite-modal-contact-picker
surfaces_touched: app/src/components/groups/InviteMemberModal.tsx (npub Input + QR-scan removed; Chakra <Select> picker testid=invite-contact-select; guidance empty-state testid=invite-guidance-state + /contacts link; resolveInviteTarget/submitInvite narrowed to pubkeyHex-in adapter; DD-1/DD-8 doc-comments rewritten to attribute the decode seam to parseContactCard)
app/src/lib/i18n.ts (new keys en+de: inviteContactLabel, inviteReasonAlreadyMember, inviteReasonBlocked, inviteGuidanceMessage, inviteGuidanceLink; inviteTitle reworded)
app/tests/unit/cards/inviteByCard.test.ts (card/QR/tampered-signature/bare-npub/KeyPackage-parity tests removed; replaced with pubkeyHex-in adapter tests + verbatim-failure-forwarding it.each)
stories.notes: AC-UX-6 guidance copy verified in both locales: en names 'profile card'+'sharing', de names 'Profilkarte'+'teilst', neither contains 'npub'. AC-UX-7 both removed testids (invite-npub-input, invite-scan-qr-btn) gone from JSX. AC-ERR-4 guidance gating derived from predicate output (hasSelectable=entries.some(selectable)), not a re-derived check. AC-SEC-1 pure local reads only (readStoredContacts/readContactCacheSnapshot + in-memory groups), isOpen-guarded. AC-DEP-1 untouched (MarmotContext.tsx/groups.tsx not in diff). AC-DEP-2 en/de parity for all 5 new keys confirmed. AC-STRUCT-2 remaining tests meaningful (real cache/contacts/knownPeers zero-write assertions retained; removed tests deleted not skipped). AC-STRUCT-3 self-correction landed: doc-comment correctly names parseContactCard as the seam. No cross-module reach-in — all imports are public exports/hooks; contacts.ts/contactCard.ts/MarmotContext.tsx not modified. Opus finding (3 dead i18n keys: inviteNpubLabel/inviteNpubPlaceholder/inviteHelp) fixed directly by lead post-review; typecheck+unit suite reconfirmed green (3141/1 skipped). Codex P1 finding (e2e specs still drive invite-npub-input, make test-e2e-all will fail) is EXPECTED transient breakage from sequential story implementation — S3 (next story, not yet started) exists specifically to migrate group-setup.ts and all affected specs to the new picker. Not a defect in S2; deferred to S3, not remediated here.

stories.name: e2e-shared-contact-seeding-helper
surfaces_touched: app/tests/e2e/helpers/group-setup.ts (new exports seedContact + inviteContactViaPicker driving real /add#c= add-contact path then S2 picker; createGroupAndInvite rewired through inviteContactViaPicker)
app/tests/e2e/groups-error-cases.spec.ts (KeyPackage-less test converted to picker path; 'Invalid npub format' test DELETED + REPLACED by AC-E2E-5 blocked-contact-cannot-submit)
~21 further group/dm specs: local inviteMember helper or inline npub-fill block mechanically swapped to inviteContactViaPicker (verified regex transform)
stories.consumes_seam: S2 invite-picker-guidance-contract (invite-contact-select / invite-guidance-state / invite-submit-btn testids + isSelectionValid submit-gating)
stories.notes: CLAUDE.md e2e publish-through-app rule HELD: seedContact is page.goto('/add#c='+npub) + real UI wait (contact-added-success|add-page-error), no raw WebSocket / no direct localStorage contact write. The 3 WebSocket hits in the tree (dm-historical-recovery.spec.ts, relay-query.ts, forgedPairingAck.ts) are pre-existing and NOT in S3's file set. invite-npub-input references now ZERO across app/tests/e2e (grep -rl empty); invite-scan-qr-btn also zero. AC-E2E-5 deletion+replacement is a GENUINE assertion (not rubber-stamp): seeds Bob+Carol, blocks Bob via real BlockContactButton flow, asserts Bob's <option> isDisabled AND submit-btn stays disabled after force-select attempt AND neither invite-error nor invite-success appears — matches production isSelectionValid=entries.some(e=>e.selectable && pubkey match) exactly. Pull-only judgment call CORROBORATED against groups-admin.spec.ts:127 ('Pull-only invitations (Walled Garden v2)') and groups-pull-only-invitation-accept.spec.ts (group card NOT visible until Bob accepts) — architect's model is real, not self-consistent-only; AC-E2E-8 was INVERTED in round-2 e2e remediation: group.memberPubkeys updates synchronously on inviteByNpub success (the MLS commit), so a pending contact is already_member and its option is DISABLED, not enabled. The rewritten spec asserts Bob's option disabled + Carol stays selectable + submit stays disabled; see spec.md DD-4. Spot-checked 6 mechanical transforms (groups-admin/cancel-pending/reactions/rename/transitive-invite/lazy-updates): all correct page var + npub var, correct import add, callers no longer pre-open the modal (helper opens it). New specs well-formed: real toBeAttached/toBeVisible waits + behavioral guidance-link nav assertion; waitForTimeout only for legitimate KeyPackage/relay settle, never as a sync crutch for state. Cross-module reach-in: NONE — S3 touched only app/tests/e2e/**; the production files in the working tree (InviteMemberModal.tsx/contacts.ts/i18n.ts/inviteByCard.test.ts) are S1/S2's already-reviewed uncommitted work, not S3. Minor (sev-3, non-blocking): seedContact treats ANY add-page-error as idempotent-success, which could in principle mask a genuine add failure — but degrades to a slower picker-option-timeout failure, never a false pass. Not remediated. Round-2 e2e-driven remediation (2026-07-14): all 27 epic-touched specs run live against Docker/strfry; found and fixed 4 real bugs (invalid npub checksum fixture, wrong assumption about Playwright selectOption on disabled options, Next.js trailing-slash href, and a DD-4/memberPubkeys timing contradiction requiring a user-confirmed product-behavior correction). See result.json remediation_notes round 2. Pre-commit gate (2026-07-14): reviewed the 4 lead-made round-2 e2e fixes + spec/AC/epic-state corrections. All four fixes verified genuinely correct against production (npub dead00..beef valid+unpublished; isSelectionValid guard at InviteMemberModal.tsx:97/222; href /contacts + trailingSlash:true = /contacts/; rewritten pending spec is real, drives a true invite-success then asserts disabled+submit-gated). AC-E2E-2 holds, no raw WebSocket, ac_closure for AC-UX-4/AC-E2E-8 accurate. One residual doc contradiction found and fixed by the lead: acceptance-criteria.md's 'pending contact' terminology definition (was describing the old selectable premise) and stories.json's S3 scope description (same stale premise) both corrected to match DD-4/AC-UX-4.
